pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses the javax.* namespace, causing compatibility issues with modern libraries and JDK features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping it at 11 would result in incorrect bytecode generation and potential runtime incompatibilities with Java 21-specific features or libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta Validation API dependency to replace the removed javax.validation API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes the javax.validation API in favor of Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.validation). Without this dependency, code referencing validation annotations will fail to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Shiro Spring Boot Starter to a Jakarta-compatible snapshot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The previous version (1.8.0) relies on javax.* namespaces which are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Jakarta EE). The new version with the 'jakarta' classifier is required for compilation and runtime compatibility.

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors.

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Migrate Bean Validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors.

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation package.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.
